flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Warren County Community College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.3k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Warren County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Warren County Community College rose 69% between 2006 and 2009 (10.8% → 18.3%).
